raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"By 'make this stronger', do you primarily mean strengthening the conceptual framing and logical arguments (R1.1 and R1.2), polishing the writing style (R1.6), or a combination of these?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to make the section stronger centrally involves reframing the thesis, gap, or contribution claims to enhance their impact and persuasiveness.","R1.2":"Ensuring logical consistency is central to strengthening the overall argument chain without introducing weaknesses.","R1.6":"Writing polish at the sentence and paragraph level is load-bearing for making the text more concise, flowing, and compelling.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral but always active to ensure any strengthened claims appropriately acknowledge limitations.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggeration when making the section's assertions stronger.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to keep the strengthening within the original section's boundaries and intent.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral but always active to mitigate potential misuse of the strengthened research description.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is peripheral but always active to maintain clear attribution in any modifications."}}

parsed.clarification_question: By 'make this stronger', do you primarily mean strengthening the conceptual framing and logical arguments (R1.1 and R1.2), polishing the writing style (R1.6), or a combination of these?

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to make the section stronger centrally involves reframing the thesis, gap, or contribution claims to enhance their impact and persuasiveness.
rationale.R1.2: Ensuring logical consistency is central to strengthening the overall argument chain without introducing weaknesses.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish at the sentence and paragraph level is load-bearing for making the text more concise, flowing, and compelling.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral but always active to ensure any strengthened claims appropriately acknowledge limitations.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggeration when making the section's assertions stronger.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to keep the strengthening within the original section's boundaries and intent.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral but always active to mitigate potential misuse of the strengthened research description.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is peripheral but always active to maintain clear attribution in any modifications.
